issues.description: After backup restore, ActiveBudgetManager not updated with restored budget ID
loadCategories() not scoped to active budget
ALTER TABLE cannot add FK constraints, need table recreation
Per-row update in migration loop, should batch
Race condition: getActiveBudgetId returns 0 before DataStore loads

result.summary: Architecture sound, 2 high/medium issues need fixing before release
